summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AAA Irrigation Service invoice management system. All backend APIs and frontend features working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint (200 OK)
Create invoice API with auto-generated invoice numbers
Get all invoices API with proper data retrieval
Get single invoice by ID with complete data
Update invoice API with partial updates
Payment status update API with multiple payment methods
Delete invoice API with proper cleanup
404 error handling for non-existent invoices
Invoice list page loads with company branding and logo
TCEQ footer notice displays correctly
Create new invoice form with all required fields
Invoice form calculations work correctly (8.25% tax rate)
Invoice template displays with Texas seal watermark background
Customer info section displays on left side
Invoice details section displays on right side
Line items table shows exactly 5 rows as required
Totals section calculates subtotal, tax, discount, and total correctly
Payment modal opens with all three payment options
Credit Card option shows Chase processing information
Cash App option displays correct handle: $AAAIRRIGATIONSERVICE
Zelle option displays correct email: aaairrigationservice@yahoo.com
Print button functionality available
Navigation between pages works correctly
Invoice save and retrieval workflow complete
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (8/8 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (16/16 features tested successfully)
